one_time_description: Agricultural Benefit Claim payment received from trust fund
economic_notes: Nation has interests in Atikameg Construction and Oilfield Maintenance Corporation, Atikameg Timber Limited Partnership, Kee Tas Kee Now Sawmill Ltd., Atikameg Timber Ltd., and Whitefish Lake Band Development Corporation. Agriculture Benefit trust fund balance of $74.6M managed by RBC Wealth Management. Land Claim investment fund managed by CIBC Private Wealth Management.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020, not 2024 as template suggests. The statement consolidates 5 controlled entities using equity method (investment in First Nation controlled entities). Large trust fund assets (~$75M agriculture benefit funds + land claim funds) are included in financial assets as investments. Agricultural Benefit Claim of $4.576M is a significant non-recurring transfer from trust. ISC funding not separately identified - KTC (Kee Tas Kee Now Tribal Council) is the primary funding conduit at $9.78M. No remuneration schedule included in the extracted text. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with uncertain impact. Contingent liability of $331,000 for breach of contract claim. Annual debt service estimated from Schedule 1 long-term liabilities repaid line.
